data.title: MASSKIP: Multi-Amplifier Sensing Skipper CCD Pipeline
data.name: MAS-Skippers-codes
data.description: MASSKIP is a prototype Python pipeline designed for the basic reduction of images acquired with a 16-channel MAS Skipper CCD. It supports MEF (Multi-Extension FITS) files and follows a standard overscan + bias + flat calibration procedure, inspired by data reduction pipelines such as SOAR/Goodman.
